The Art of
Fragrance

At Lumière, we believe a fragrance is more than just a scent—it's a spectrum of memories captured in a bottle. Each creation is an alchemy of light and rare botanicals.

Our master perfumers blend the alchemy of light with the depth of the earth to create olfactory masterpieces that evolve on your skin.

Explore the crafteast

Join the Circle

Be the first to experience seasonal launches.

Lumière

The art of light, captured in fragrance. Ethically sourced, masterfully crafted in France.
